title: pluchea rubelliflora
intro: Pluchea rubelliflora, also known as Red Mallow Bush or Red Flowered Pluchea, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in various forms of medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pluchea rubelliflora include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Pluchea rubelliflora is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
